creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:
I have a HP Gen10 server with 50 disks hanging on two different controllers P408i, P408e and P208i) (and a couple of expanders). Some of the disks are in an external enclosure.

I tried upgrading this server from 12.3-p5 to 13.1-p2.

Upon booting the the kernel, it panics rather late in the boot process, with this:

panic: make_dev_alias_v: bad is_name (errror=22, si_name=enc0n5001438041aad8ba/type@0/slot@1/elmdesc@("Name": DriveBay1")/pass27

This also happens with FreeBSD 13.0

It looks like it does not like my enclosure.
